summary: Horizontal video, a rebroadcast Fox News panel segment with Kayleigh McEnany on 'Outnumbered' discussing the DHS-IRS deal to share taxpayer data to locate illegal immigrants for deportation, intercut with enforcement B-roll. It is a TV news and commentary clip with no music.
notable_text: DHS & IRS REACH DEAL TO AID DEPORTATIONS; IRS AND DHS REACH HISTORIC DEAL TO AID IN PURSUIT OF ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS SUBJECT TO DEPORTATION; FOX NEWS ALERT
